description: A task instruction modal appears on the screen, overlaying the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen shows a detailed task description for a UX research study about home loans.

description: User is reading the task instructions regarding searching for and evaluating home loan options.
frame_description: User remains on the task instruction screen for approximately 42 seconds.

description: The task instruction modal is dismissed, revealing the Google homepage again.
frame_description: The Google search interface is visible with a cursor positioned near the center.
